title: Cassava Fritters with Fluffy Brazilian Cheese
description: A crispy Brazilian-inspired snack featuring cassava fritters topped with fluffy cheese and a side of tangy sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine cassava flour, grated cassava, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, chopped onion, minced garlic, and a pinch of salt.
Add the egg mixture to the cassava mixture and stir until a dough forms.
Heat olive oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the dough into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters until crispy and golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot with fluffy cheese and a side of tangy sauce.
